title: Room Master (constitution)
public_claim: Room Master is the MuranoOS constitution for what a room is allowed to be.
distinctive_mechanism: It defines room purpose, UI/UX expectations, live state, memory, instruments, export surfaces, and Red Team lossless replacement discipline so future rooms inherit a common architecture instead of improvising their own rules.
use_value: It matters because MuranoOS can only scale if each room preserves evidence, roles, state, and review obligations in a consistent way.

component_proofs.claim_supported: Room Master is the MuranoOS constitution for what a room is allowed to be.; the step records the decision path so the reader can see how the project moves from input to governed output.
component_proofs.input: source packet, code-ready room description, scope, and intended runtime
component_proofs.expected_output: bounded definition of what the handoff asks a builder to construct
component_proofs.current_evidence: Expected proof artifact: bounded definition of what the handoff asks a builder to construct
component_proofs.verification_check: Open or inspect the local runtime path for Room Master (constitution) Handoff Identity; confirm a room, action, or state record traces to the governing contract.
